plan.description: Plan architecture, break down features, design implementation strategy

build.description: Implement features, write code, run tests — orchestrates backend_dev, frontend_dev, ai_engineer

explore.description: Quick codebase exploration, search files, understand project structure

general.description: General-purpose tasks, research, multi-step problem solving

project_lead.description: Orchestrate sub-agents, maintain architectural integrity, coordinate cross-module work — uses git-advanced-workflows for version control

backend_dev.description: Spring Boot 3 / Java 21 backend — auth, user_profile, food_catalog, meal_tracking, dashboard, admin modules. Uses java-springboot skill for Controller→Service→Repository pattern, package-by-feature structure, and @Async non-blocking tasks

frontend_dev.description: Flutter mobile app + React admin dashboard — screens, Riverpod state management, API integration. Uses typescript-react-reviewer for React TSX functional components with hooks

ai_engineer.description: FastAPI + PyTorch — food recognition model, calorie estimation, image processing pipeline. Uses fastapi-python skill for REST endpoint design, async request handling, and Pydantic models

devops_engineer.description: Docker Compose, CI/CD pipelines, cloud deployment, monitoring, infrastructure-as-code — multi-service orchestration for backend, ai-service, MongoDB

reviewer.description: Code review, security audit, quality assurance — enforces JWT auth (jwt-security skill), BCrypt passwords, RBAC roles (USER/ADMIN), account lockout after 5 failed attempts, 80%+ test coverage

docs_writer.description: Documentation, API docs, README, project memory, changelogs — maintains HISTORY_PROMPTS.md and .opencode/context/ specs

database_admin.description: MongoDB schema design, compound indexes, aggregation pipelines, query optimization — manages nutrition_db collections with snake_case field naming

qa_tester.description: TDD workflow — writes tests before implementation. Enforces 90% service coverage, 80% controller coverage. Runs ./mvnw test, flutter test, and npm test across all modules

security_auditor.description: Security audit — JWT token validation, refresh token rotation, password policy enforcement, API endpoint protection, .env secrets management, OWASP vulnerability checks
